  • Become a better trader FREE 2 WEEK TRIAL


Many of the most profitable trades will be when you are buying stocks before there’s momentum. That’s when most other traders start buying them, at much higher prices.

Did you know that some of the best reversal set ups will show subtle signals (well under the radar of any stock screener) that can give you good reasons to start buying well before they surge higher, and breakout.

That’s where we come in.

Here’s one example  CELH
Updated April 11th, 2025  Chart will open in a new tab

Also browse browse the mini charts to the right to see some of our most recent stock alerts to subscribers.

Join us now with a FREE 2 week trial

We also trade options, both long and short

_________________________________________
When to buy stocks?
Bullish setups don’t always show up in green, if you know what to look for.
Understanding this can give you such a huge advantage to not only drastically increase your profits potential, but at the same time reducing your downside risk. And why we often are able to position well ahead of most others.
See for yourself with a Free 2 Week Trial Now
